title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly autonomous in writing, reviewing, and testing code within the company, and is contributing to AI system development. OpenAI and other labs are raising similar concerns about rapid progress in AI self-improvement capabilities and the need for coordinated governance frameworks.
